### Checklist

- [ ] Item follows the format: `- [Name](url) - Description.`
- [ ] URL is valid and points to the correct project
- [ ] Description is concise and objective (one sentence)
- [ ] Item is added in alphabetical order within its section
- [ ] Project is actively maintained (commits within last 12 months)
- [ ] Project has meaningful adoption (50+ GitHub stars or equivalent)
- [ ] No duplicates — checked the existing list
